---
name: Plan First
description: "Create a plan-first record for a selected goal or task before implementation"
argument-hint: "Goal or task to plan"
agent: "agent"
---
Create a plan-first record for the selected goal or task.

Requirements:

- Follow the repository rules in [workspace instructions](../copilot-instructions.md).
- Use the exact output structure from [plan-first template](../templates/plan-first.md).
- Keep the scope small enough for one implementation cycle when possible.
- If the work is too large, propose a split into smaller tasks.
- Call out affected files, tests, risks, and definition of done.
- If any prerequisite information is missing, list it under Open Questions.
